_readme: Sources for the fantasy news hub (/fantasy/news). These are VERIFIED SOURCES surfaced to users as-is — we do NOT reword them (that's the x-track/social pipeline's job, and a different product). We link out and credit. Keep the list tight: the feed is judged on signal, not volume.

accounts.note: injury news — closest thing we have to an injuries feed

relevance._note: An item must mention a Premier League club (or an obvious fantasy term) to reach the feed. The hub is PL-only, like our SportMonks plan — a Serie A transfer rumour is noise to a fantasy manager.
